fixed_rules.name: Deterministic stage order
fixed_rules.description: Pipeline stages must execute in a fixed, declared order; no implicit stages.

fixed_rules.name: Artifacts must be schema-validatable
fixed_rules.description: All emitted artifacts must have a schema_ref and be machine-validated where applicable.

fixed_rules.name: Pins are required
fixed_rules.description: Runs must record pinned versions for libraries, schemas, templates, and standards.

configurable_rules.name: Default artifact hashing policy
configurable_rules.description: Default hashing policy for artifacts unless overridden by stricter packs.
